"It orchestrates three categories of agents: (i) inter-slice, intra-slice resource allocation agents, (ii) network application orchestration agents, and (iii) self-healing agents." 它协调三类智能体：（i）跨切片/切片内资源分配智能体，（ii）网络应用编排智能体，（iii）自愈智能体。  5. "The orchestration takes place with the help of an Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) module that integrates knowledge from heterogeneous sources." 编排过程借助智能检索增强生成（RAG）模块实现，该模块整合了异构源知识。  6. "In this proposed methodology, the super agent directly interfaces with operators and generates sequential policies to activate relevant agents." 在该方法中，超级智能体直接与操作员交互，并生成顺序策略以激活相关智能体。   性能评估显示，该框架在三个基线对比中表现出色，显著提升了吞吐量、降低了网络延迟，并在切片级和系统级指标上实现了更高的能效。智能框架引入了双层人类操作员意图验证方法，通过生成式AI时序预测器在切片级和关键性能指标（KPI）级进行意图验证。  准确度达88.5%。自愈机制能在性能下降事件中自动恢复90%的性能，无需人工干预即可避免服务质量下降。 </think>  本文提出了一种面向无线网络的智能体人工智能（AI）框架。该框架协调一组由人类操作员自然语言（NL）输入指导的AI智能体。其核心是分层在线决策Transformer（H-ODT）驱动的超级智能体，协调三类智能体：（i）跨切片/切片内资源分配智能体，（ii）网络应用编排智能体，（iii）自愈智能体。编排过程借助智能检索增强生成（RAG）模块实现，该模块整合异构源知识。超级智能体直接与操作员交互，生成顺序策略以激活相关智能体。相较于三个先进基线方案，所提框架在吞吐量、网络时延和能效方面均有提升，覆盖切片级和系统级性能指标。此外，该智能体框架引入双层人类操作员意图验证方法，在切片级和关键性能指标（KPI）级采用生成式AI时序预测器进行意图验证，能够以88.5%的准确率排除性能降级意图。当遭遇性能降级事件时，框架的自愈能力自动恢复90%的先前性能，在无人工介入情况下避免服务质量下降。

overflow_list.title: UAV Control and Communication Enabled Low-Altitude Economy: Challenges, Resilient Architecture and Co-design Strategies
overflow_list.authors: Tianhao Liang, Nanchi Su, Yuqi Ping, Guangyu Lei, Xinglin Chen, Longyu Zhou, Tingting Zhang, Qinyu Zhang, Tony Q. S. Quek
overflow_list.abstract: The emerging low-altitude economy has catalyzed the large-scale deployment of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), driving a paradigm shift in environment monitoring, logistics, and emergency response. However, operating within these environments presents notable challenges as pervasive coverage holes, unpredictable interference, and spectrum scarcity. To this end, this article present a communication and control co-design framework to enable a resilient architecture for cellular-connected UAVs. Specifically, we first characterize typical service applications and their stringent performance requirements, followed by a comprehensive analysis of the unique challenges. To bridge the gap between volatile wireless links and rigid flight stability, a three layered architecture is proposed, integrating pre-flight strategic planning, in-flight adaptive action, and system-level resource orchestration. Furthermore, we detail the key enabling technologies for communication and control co-design. Preliminary case studies are proposed to validate that the co-design framework significantly improve the resilience of cellular-connected UAV systems, providing a robust foundation for the evolution of intelligent low-altitude networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 新兴低空经济推动了无人机的大规模部署，带来了环境监测、物流和应急响应等领域的范式转变。然而，在上述环境中运行面临显著挑战，包括普遍存在的覆盖盲区、不可预测的干扰以及频谱资源稀缺。为此，本文提出了一种通信与控制协同设计框架，以实现蜂窝连接无人机的弹性架构。具体而言，首先分析了典型服务应用场景及其严格的性能需求，随后对其独特挑战进行了综合评估。为弥合不稳定的无线链路与刚性飞行控制之间的差距，提出了一种三层架构，整合了飞行前战略规划、飞行中自适应决策与系统级资源编排。此外，详细阐述了通信控制协同设计的关键支撑技术。初步案例验证表明，该协同设计框架显著提升了蜂窝连接无人机系统的韧性，为智能低空网络的演进奠定了坚实基础。

overflow_list.title: Decision-Theoretic Safety Assessment of Persona-Driven Multi-Agent Systems in O-RAN
overflow_list.authors: Zeinab Nezami, Syed Ali Raza Zaidi, Maryam Hafeez, Louis Powell, Vara Prasad Talari, Mallik Tatipamula
overflow_list.abstract: Autonomous network management in Open Radio Access Networks requires intelligent decision making across conflicting objectives, yet existing LLM based multi agent systems employ homogeneous strategies and lack systematic predeployment validation. We introduce a persona driven multi agent framework where configurable behavioral personas structured specifications encoding optimization priorities, risk tolerance, and decision making style influence five specialized agents (planning, coordination, resource allocation, code generation, analysis). To enable rigorous validation, we develop a three dimensional evaluation framework grounded in decision theory, measuring normative compliance (optimality adherence), prescriptive alignment (behavioral guideline consistency), and behavioral dynamics (emergent system properties). We evaluate 486 persona configurations across two ORAN optimization challenges (energy efficient resource allocation and network load balancing). Results demonstrate that persona agent alignment significantly impacts both individual performance (14.3 percent) and emergent multi agent coordination, with retrieval architecture (GraphRAG vs. RAG) fundamentally constraining customization effectiveness. Single agent persona modifications propagate system wide through cascading effects, with certain combinations exhibiting detectable fundamental incompatibilities. Our framework provides systematic validation mechanisms for deploying LLM based automation in mission critical telecommunications infrastructure.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 开放式无线接入网（O-RAN）中的自主网络管理需在冲突目标间做出智能决策，然而现有基于LLM的多智能体系统采用同质化策略，缺乏系统化的部署前验证。我们提出一种角色驱动的多智能体框架，其中可配置行为角色——编码优化优先级、风险容忍度和决策风格的结构化规范——影响五个专用智能体（规划、协调、资源分配、代码生成、分析）。为实现严格验证，我们基于决策理论构建三维评估框架，测量规范合规性（最优性遵循）、处方对齐度（行为准则一致性）和行为动态性（涌现系统特性）。我们在两个O-RAN优化挑战（节能资源分配和网络负载均衡）中评估了486种角色配置。结果表明，角色-智能体对齐显著影响个体性能（14.3%）和涌现的多智能体协调，检索架构（GraphRAG vs. RAG）从根本上约束定制化效果。单智能体角色修改通过级联效应传播至全系统，某些组合呈现可检测的根本不兼容性。本框架为关键任务电信基础设施中部署基于LLM的自动化提供系统化验证机制。

overflow_list.title: MIMO OFDM-Enabled ISAC for Low-Altitude Non-Cooperative UAV Surveillance: A Survey
overflow_list.authors: Shiyu Bai, Sijia Li, Cunyi Yin, Wenqiu Qu, Li-Ta Hsu, Yuanwei Liu, Wen-Hua Chen
overflow_list.affiliations: Shiyu Baiiswiththe Hong Kong Polytechnic University,Hong Kong,China | University,China | University | China(e-mail:wenhua.chen@polyu.edu.hk) | University China | University,Beijing,China
overflow_list.abstract: The widespread use of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in low-altitude airspace has raised significant safety and security concerns, motivating the development of reliable non-cooperative UAV surveillance technologies. Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC), enabled by multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) architectures and orthogonal frequency-division multiplexing (OFDM) waveforms, has emerged as a promising paradigm for leveraging cellular infrastructure to support large-scale sensing without additional hardware deployment. This paper presents the first comprehensive survey dedicated to MIMO OFDM-enabled ISAC for low-altitude non-cooperative UAV surveillance, where the targeted UAVs do not intentionally assist the monitoring system through dedicated signaling or prior coordinate sharing. We first analyze the unique propagation characteristics of low-altitude UAV sensing, including severe clutter, rapid channel variations, and mixed near/far-field effects, and discuss corresponding waveform design principles. We then systematically review existing MIMO OFDM-enabled UAV surveillance techniques along four key dimensions: ISAC system modeling and network optimization, UAV detection and tracking algorithms under single and networked base station (BS) architectures, UAV identification techniques based on micro-Doppler and learning-based approaches, and experimental validations and practical field trials. Subsequently, we summarize open challenges such as sensing under severe clutter and multipath, data scarcity for identification, cooperative multi-BS fusion, and real-world deployment constraints. Finally, we outline promising future research directions toward 5G-Advanced (5G-A) and 6G-enabled low-altitude surveillance systems.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 无人机在低空空域的广泛使用引发了显著的安全问题，推动了可靠非合作无人机监视技术的发展。基于多输入多输出（MIMO）架构和正交频分复用（OFDM）波形的通感一体化（ISAC），已成为利用蜂窝基础设施支持大规模感知而无需额外硬件部署的重要范式。本文首次针对MIMO OFDM赋能的ISAC在低空非合作无人机监视领域进行系统综述，其中目标无人机不通过专用信令或先验坐标共享协助监视系统。我们首先分析了低空无人机感知的独特传播特性，包括严重杂波、信道快变和近/远场混合效应，并讨论了相应的波形设计原则；随后从四个维度系统梳理现有技术：ISAC系统建模与网络优化、单站与组网架构下的无人机检测跟踪算法、基于微多普勒和学习方法的无人机识别技术，以及实验验证与外场试验；进而总结了严重杂波与多径下的感知、识别数据稀缺、多基站协作融合及实际部署约束等开放挑战；最后展望了面向5G-A与6G的低空监视系统的未来研究方向。

overflow_list.title: Air-to-Air Channel Characterization for UAV Communications at 3.4 GHz
overflow_list.authors: Anıl Gürses, John Kesler, Mihail L. Sichitiu
overflow_list.abstract: Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) networks require accurate Air-to-Air (A2A) channel models, but most existing work focuses on Air-to-Ground links and leaves the sub-6 GHz A2A channel poorly characterized. We present preliminary 3.4 GHz A2A channel measurements collected with a lightweight, reconfigurable, open-source channel sounder built from USRP B210 software-defined radios and a high-precision GNSS-disciplined oscillator mounted on two UAVs. Measurements were conducted at the AERPAW Lake Wheeler testbed using a spherical flight trajectory around a second drone to capture channel behavior over varying altitudes, elevation angles, and relative headings. From these data, we analyze fundamental channel properties, extract channel impulse responses, model fading behavior as a function of link geometry, and characterize fading statistics including RMS delay spread. The resulting dataset and analysis provide a more realistic basis for the design, emulation, and evaluation of physical-layer and MAC protocols for next-generation UAV communication networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: <think> 这是一篇关于无人机网络空中对空中（A2A）信道测量的论文摘要。让我翻译它，保持学术准确性，简洁流畅，保留专业术语。  关键词汇： - Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) - 无人机 - Air-to-Air (A2A) - 空对空 - Air-to-Ground - 空对地 - channel models - 信道模型 - sub-6 GHz - 6 GHz以下 - channel sounder - 信道探测仪 - USRP B210 - 软件定义无线电 - GNSS-disciplined oscillator - GNSS驯服振荡器 - AERPAW Lake Wheeler testbed - AERPAW Lake Wheeler测试平台 - spherical flight trajectory - 球形飞行轨迹 - elevation angles - 仰角 - relative headings - 相对航向 - channel impulse responses - 信道脉冲响应 - fading behavior - 衰落特性 - RMS delay spread - 均方根时延扩展 - physical-layer and MAC protocols - 物理层和MAC协议  让我组织翻译： </think>  无人机网络需要精确的空对空（A2A）信道模型，但现有研究大多聚焦于空对地链路，对6 GHz以下频段的A2A信道缺乏充分表征。本研究利用轻量级、可重构的开源信道探测仪开展3.4 GHz A2A信道测量，该探测仪基于USRP B210软件定义无线电和高精度GNSS驯服振荡器，搭载于两架无人机上。测量在AERPAW Lake Wheeler测试平台进行，采用球形飞行轨迹绕飞第二架无人机，以采集不同高度、仰角和相对航向下信道特性数据。基于测量数据，本文分析了信道基本特性、提取信道脉冲响应、建立了链路几何参数与衰落特性的关联模型，并表征了均方根时延扩展等衰落统计特性。该数据集与分析为下一代无人机通信网络的物理层和MAC协议设计、仿真与评估提供了更为现实的依据。

overflow_list.title: Evaluation of gNB Monostatic Sensing for UAV Use Case
overflow_list.authors: Steve Blandino, Neeraj Varshney, Jian Wang, Jack Chuang, Camillo Gentile, Nada Golmie
overflow_list.abstract: 3GPP Release 19 has initiated the standardization of integrated sensing and communications (ISAC), including a channel model for monostatic sensing, evaluation scenarios, and performance assessment methodologies. These common assumptions provide an important basis for ISAC evaluation, but reproducible end-to-end studies still require a transparent sensing implementation. This paper evaluates 5G New Radio (NR) base station (gNB)-based monostatic sensing for the Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) use case using a 5G NR downlink Cyclic Prefix-Orthogonal Frequency Division Multiplexing (CP-OFDM) waveform and positioning reference signals (PRS), following 3GPP Urban Macro-Aerial Vehicle (UMa-AV) scenario assumptions. We present an end-to-end processing chain for multi-target detection and 3D localization, achieving more than 70% detection probability with less than 5% false alarm rate, in the considered scenario. For correctly detected targets, localization errors are on the order of a few meters, with a 90th-percentile error of 4m and 6m in the vertical and horizontal directions, respectively. To support reproducible baseline studies and further research, we release the simulator 5GNRad, which reproduces our evaluation
overflow_list.summary_cn: 3GPP Release 19已启动通感一体化（ISAC）标准化工作，涵盖单基地感知信道模型、评估场景及性能评估方法。这些公共假设为ISAC评估提供了重要基础，但可复现的端到端研究仍需透明的感知实现方案。本文基于3GPP城宏-无人机（UMa-AV）场景假设，采用5G NR下行CP-OFDM波形与定位参考信号（PRS），评估了基于5G NR基站（gNB）的单基地感知在无人机场景中的性能。我们提出了面向多目标检测与三维定位的端到端处理链路，在所考虑的场景中实现了70%以上的检测概率，虚警率低于5%。对正确检测的目标，定位误差在数米量级，垂直与水平方向的第90百分位误差分别为4m和6m。为支撑可复现的基线研究与后续探索，我们开源了仿真器5GNRad，可完整复现本文评估。

overflow_list.title: Adversarial Attacks in AI-Driven RAN Slicing: SLA Violations and Recovery
overflow_list.authors: Deemah H. Tashman, Soumaya Cherkaoui
overflow_list.abstract: Next-generation (NextG) cellular networks are designed to support emerging applications with diverse data rate and latency requirements, such as immersive multimedia services and large-scale Internet of Things deployments. A key enabling mechanism is radio access network (RAN) slicing, which dynamically partitions radio resources into virtual resource blocks to efficiently serve heterogeneous traffic classes, including enhanced mobile broadband (eMBB), massive machine-type communications (mMTC), and ultra-reliable low-latency communications (URLLC). In this paper, we study the impact of adversarial attacks on AI-driven RAN slicing decisions, where a budget-constrained adversary selectively jams slice transmissions to bias deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based resource allocation, and quantify the resulting service level agreement (SLA) violations and post-attack recovery behavior. Our results indicate that budget-constrained adversarial jamming can induce severe and slice-dependent steady-state SLA violations. Moreover, the DRL agent's reward converges toward the clean baseline only after a non-negligible recovery period.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 下一代（NextG）蜂窝网络旨在支持具有不同数据速率和延迟需求的新兴应用，如沉浸式多媒体服务和大规模物联网部署。其关键使能机制是无线接入网（RAN）切片——将无线资源动态划分为虚拟资源块，以高效服务异构流量类别，包括增强移动宽带（eMBB）、大规模机器类通信（mMTC）和超可靠低延迟通信（URLLC）。本文研究了对抗性攻击对AI驱动RAN切片决策的影响：预算受限的对手选择性地干扰切片传输，以偏置基于深度强化学习（DRL）的资源分配，并量化由此产生的服务级别协议（SLA）违规及攻击后恢复行为。结果表明，预算受限的对抗性干扰可引发严重且与切片相关的稳态SLA违规，且DRL智能体的奖励仅在不可忽视的恢复期后才能收敛至正常基线水平。

overflow_list.title: POLARIS: PHY-Aware Spectrum Steering for Dynamic Spectrum Sharing
overflow_list.authors: Stavros Dimou, Guevara Noubir
overflow_list.abstract: Dynamic Spectrum Sharing (DSS) enables flexible activation of additional spectrum resources but leaves open a key runtime question: once new spectrum becomes available, which steering mechanism should migrate connected devices toward it with minimum service disruption? We present the first PHY-aware characterization of 3GPP-compliant UE steering mechanisms, including Bandwidth Part (BWP) reconfiguration, Carrier Aggregation (CA), E-UTRA-NR Dual Connectivity (EN-DC), Connected-Mode Handover (HO), and Release and Redirection (R&R), using modem-level traces from devices connected to operational networks, collected across 1,600 executions over four months in 12 urban areas. By mapping each mechanism to observable PHY-layer milestones, we decompose steering latency into intrinsic PHY-centric execution and RRC-to-PHY completion components, revealing substantial heterogeneity: NR BWP achieves 6.25 ms mean latency with zero tail exceedance above 50 ms, while CA exceeds 1225 ms; mobility procedures remain largely modem-bound, whereas discovery-driven mechanisms experience significant RRC-to-PHY completion amplification. Guided by these measurements, we design POLARIS, an O-RAN-based system that selects the least disruptive steering mechanism via a two-parameter disruption score. POLARIS reduces mean latency by up to 85.1% and T95 by 89.7% over static or non-adaptive baselines, eliminates tail exceedance above 50 ms, and avoids high-disruption mechanisms, demonstrating that PHY-layer execution profiling enables reliable and context-aware spectrum steering in DSS-enabled networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 动态频谱共享（DSS）能够灵活激活额外频谱资源,但存在关键运行时问题：当新频谱可用时,何种导向机制能以最小服务中断将连接设备迁移至新频谱？本文首次对符合3GPP标准的UE导向机制进行物理层感知特性刻画,包括带宽部分（BWP）重配置、载波聚合（CA）、E-UTRA-NR双连接（EN-DC）、连接态切换（HO）及释放与重定向（R&R）。基于12个城市、历时4个月、超过1600次执行的运营商网络调制解调器追踪数据,将各机制映射至可观测物理层里程碑,分解导向时延为物理层执行和RRC到物理层完成两个分量,揭示显著异质性：NR BWP平均时延6.25ms且50ms以上无尾端超限,而CA超过1225ms；移动性过程主要由调制解调器主导,而发现驱动型机制受显著RRC到物理层完成放大影响。  基于此,我们设计POLARIS系统,一种基于O-RAN的方案,通过双参数中断评分选择最小干扰导向机制。POLARIS相比静态或非自适应基线降低平均时延85.1%、T95时延89.7%,消除50ms以上尾端超限并避免高干扰机制,证明物理层执行剖析使DSS网络中可靠且上下文感知的频谱导向成为可能。

overflow_list.title: A Three-Dimensional Path Loss Model for THz Band Aerial Communications
overflow_list.authors: Sina Jorjani, Caglar Tunc, Ozgur Gurbuz, Akhtar Saeed
overflow_list.abstract: Accurate characterization of Terahertz (THz) band path loss is critical for reliable high-frequency communication, especially in aerial networks where transceivers may operate at different altitudes. Existing THz-band path loss models for aerial networks focus on horizontal or vertical transceiver deployments, and fall short at modeling the random 3D geometry of transceiver locations. To address this limitation, we propose a new analytical THz path loss model that incorporates arbitrary 3D geometry of transceiver locations and frequency-selective absorption, obtained through a two-dimensional regression. We validate our proposed model with the propagation data collected via the Atmospheric Model (am) tool for multiple aerial link types, including drone-to-drone (Dr2Dr), medium-altitude aerial communication (MAAC), high-altitude unmanned aerial vehicles~(UAV)-to-UAV (U2U) links over varying transceiver separation and sub-THz to low-THz spectrum, i.e., 0.1--1~THz. The proposed framework provides a unified and accurate model for analyzing and designing future high-frequency aerial communication systems.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 精确表征太赫兹（THz）频段路径损耗对可靠的高频通信至关重要，尤其在收发机可能工作于不同高度的空中网络中。现有面向空中网络的THz路径损耗模型仅关注水平或垂直收发机部署，无法建模收发机位置的随机3D几何特征。为此，我们提出一种新的THz路径损耗解析模型，通过二维回归方法，纳入收发机位置的任意3D几何特征与频率选择性吸收。我们利用Atmospheric Model (am)工具采集的传播数据对所提模型进行验证，涵盖多种空中链路类型，包括无人机到无人机（Dr2Dr）、中空通信（MAAC）、高空无人机到无人机（U2U）链路，收发机间距与频谱范围覆盖0.1–1 THz的亚太赫兹至低太赫兹频段。所提框架为未来高频空中通信系统的分析与设计提供了统一且精确的模型。

overflow_list.title: Learning Compact Terrain-Context Representations for Feasibility-Aware Offline Reinforcement Learning in UAV Relaying Networks
overflow_list.authors: Joseanne Viana, Viswak R Balaji, Boris Galkin, Lester Ho, Holger Claussen
overflow_list.abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) is an attractive tool for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) systems, where online exploration is costly and raises safety concerns. In terrain-aware UAV relaying, agents may observe high-dimensional inputs such as terrain and land-cover maps, which describe the propagation environment, but complicate offline learning from fixed datasets. This paper investigates the impact of compact state representations on offline RL for UAV relaying. End-to-end service is jointly constrained by UAV--user access links and a base-station--to--UAV backhaul link, yielding feasibility limits driven by user mobility and independent of UAV control. To distinguish feasibility limits from control-induced sub-optimality, a candidate-set feasibility upper bound (CS-FUB) is introduced, which estimates the maximum achievable user coverage over a restricted set of UAV placements. To address high-dimensional terrain context, map-like observations are compressed into low-dimensional latent representations using a variational autoencoder (VAE) and policies are trained via Conservative Q-Learning (CQL). Simulation results show that training CQL directly on raw high-dimensional terrain-context states leads to slow convergence and large feasibility gaps. In contrast, VAE-encoded representations improve learning stability, enable earlier convergence to feasible relay configurations, and reduce sub-optimality relative to physical limits. Comparisons with autoencoder and linear compression baselines further demonstrate the benefit of structured representation learning for effective offline RL in terrain-aware UAV systems.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 离线强化学习是无人机（UAV）系统的理想工具，因为在线探索代价高昂且存在安全隐患。在地形感知无人机中继场景中，智能体可能观测到地形和土地覆盖图等高维输入，这些输入描述了传播环境，却增加了从固定数据集中进行离线学习的难度。本文研究了紧凑状态表示对无人机中继离线强化学习的影响。端到端服务同时受UAV-用户接入链路和基站到UAV回传链路的联合约束，产生由用户移动性驱动且与UAV控制无关的可行性边界。为区分可行性边界与控制导致的次优性，本文提出候选集可行性上界（CS-FUB），用于估计在受限UAV部署集合上的最大可达用户覆盖率。针对高维地形上下文问题，采用变分自编码器（VAE）将类图观测压缩为低维潜在表示，并通过保守Q学习（CQL）训练策略。仿真结果表明，直接在原始高维地形状态上训练CQL会导致收敛缓慢和较大的可行性差距。相比之下，VAE编码表示提升了学习稳定性，使策略更快收敛至可行的中继配置，并降低了相对于物理边界的次优性。与自编码器和线性压缩基线的对比进一步验证了结构化表示学习在地形感知无人机系统中实现高效离线强化学习的优势。

overflow_list.title: Enabling Programmable Inference and ISAC at the 6GR Edge with dApps
overflow_list.authors: Michele Polese, Rajeev Gangula, Tommaso Melodia
overflow_list.abstract: The convergence of communication, sensing, and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the Radio Access Network (RAN) offers compelling economic advantages through shared spectrum and infrastructure. How can inference and sensing be integrated in the RAN infrastructure at a system level? Current abstractions in O-RAN and 3GPP lack the interfaces and capabilities to support (i) a dynamic life cycle for inference and Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) algorithms, whose requirements and sensing targets may change over time and across sites; (ii) pipelines for AI-driven ISAC, which need complex data flows, training, and testing; (iii) dynamic device and stack configuration to balance trade-offs between connectivity, sensing, and inference services. This paper analyzes the role of a programmable, software-driven, open RAN in enabling the intelligent edge for 5G and 6G systems. We identify real-time user-plane data exposure, open interfaces for plug-and-play inference and ISAC models, closed-loop control, and AI pipelines as elements that evolutions of the O-RAN architecture can uniquely provide. Specifically, we describe how dApps - a real-time, user-plane extension of O-RAN - and a hierarchy of controllers enable real-time AI inference and ISAC. Experimental results on an open-source RAN testbed demonstrate the value of exposing I/Q samples and real-time RAN telemetry to dApps for sensing applications.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 通信、感知与人工智能（AI）在无线接入网（RAN）的融合可通过频谱与基础设施共享带来显著经济效益。如何在系统层面将推理与感知集成到RAN基础设施中？当前O-RAN和3GPP抽象缺乏支持以下能力的接口：推理与通信感知一体化（ISAC）算法的动态生命周期管理；AI驱动ISAC所需的复杂数据流水线；以及平衡连接、感知与推理服务权衡的动态设备配置。本文分析了可编程、软件驱动的开放RAN在赋能5G/6G智能边缘中的作用，指出实时用户面数据暴露、即插即用模型接口、闭环控制与AI流水线是O-RAN架构演进可独特提供的能力。实验结果表明，向dApps暴露I/Q样本与实时RAN遥测数据对感知应用具有重要价值。

overflow_list.title: Conditional Diffusion-Based Point Cloud Imaging for UAV Position and Attitude Sensing
overflow_list.authors: Xinhong Dai, Yuan Gao, Hao Jiang, Xiaojun Yuan, Xin Wang
overflow_list.affiliations: National Lab | fudan.edu.cn | College Fudan Shanghai | center
overflow_list.abstract: This paper studies an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) position and attitude sensing problem, where a base station equipped with an antenna array transmits signals to a predetermined potential flight region of a flying UAV, and exploits the reflected echoes for wireless imaging. The UAV is represented by an electromagnetic point cloud in this region that contains its spatial information and electromagnetic properties (EPs), enabling the unified extraction of UAV position, attitude, and shape from the reconstructed point cloud. To accomplish this task, we develop a generative UAV sensing approach. The position and signal-to-noise ratio embedding are adopted to assist the UAV features extraction from the estimated sensing channel under the measurement noise and channel variations. Guided by the obtained features, a conditional diffusion model is utilized to generate the point cloud. The simulation results demonstrate that the reconstructed point clouds via the proposed approach present higher fidelity compared to the competing schemes, thereby enabling a more accurate capture of the UAV attitude and shape information, as well as a more precise position estimation.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 本文研究无人机（UAV）位姿感知问题，其中配备天线阵列的基站向无人机预定飞行区域发射信号，并利用反射回波进行无线成像。无人机在该区域由包含其空间信息和电磁特性（EPs）的电磁点云表示，从而能够从重建的点云中统一提取无人机位置、姿态和形状。为此，我们提出了一种生成式无人机感知方法。采用位置和信噪比嵌入来辅助从估计的感知信道中提取无人机特征，以应对测量噪声和信道变化。在获取特征的引导下，利用条件扩散模型生成点云。仿真结果表明，与对比方案相比，所提方法重建的点云具有更高的保真度，从而能够更准确地捕获无人机姿态和形状信息，并实现更精确的位置估计。

overflow_list.title: A Techno-Economic Framework for Cost Modeling and Revenue Opportunities in Open and Programmable AI-RAN
overflow_list.authors: Gabriele Gemmi, Michele Polese, Tommaso Melodia
overflow_list.abstract: The large-scale deployment of 5G networks has not delivered the expected return on investment for mobile network operators, raising concerns about the economic viability of future 6G rollouts. At the same time, surging demand for Artificial Intelligence (AI) inference and training workloads is straining global compute capacity. AI-RAN architectures, in which Radio Access Network (RAN) platforms accelerated on Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) share idle capacity with AI workloads during off-peak periods, offer a potential path to improved capital efficiency. However, the economic case for such systems remains unsubstantiated. In this paper, we present a techno-economic analysis of AI-RAN deployments by combining publicly available benchmarks of 5G Layer-1 processing on heterogeneous platforms -- from x86 servers with accelerators for channel coding to modern GPUs -- with realistic traffic models and AI service demand profiles for Large Language Model (LLM) inference. We construct a joint cost and revenue model that quantifies the surplus compute capacity available in GPU-based RAN deployments and evaluates the returns from leasing it to AI tenants. Our results show that, across a range of scenarios encompassing token depreciation, varying demand dynamics, and diverse GPU serving densities, the additional capital and operational expenditures of GPU-heavy deployments are offset by AI-on-RAN revenue, yielding a return on investment of up to 8x. These findings strengthen the long-term economic case for accelerator-based RAN architectures and future 6G deployments.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 5G网络的大规模部署未给运营商带来预期投资回报，引发了对6G经济可行性的担忧。与此同时，AI推理与训练需求的激增正耗尽全球算力。AI-RAN架构通过GPU加速的RAN平台在闲时将空闲算力共享给AI负载，有望提升资本效率，但其经济性尚缺乏实证。本文结合5G Layer-1在异构平台（从带信道编码加速器的x86服务器到现代GPU）上的公开基准数据、真实流量模型及大语言模型（LLM）推理的AI服务需求特征，对AI-RAN部署进行技术经济分析。我们构建了联合成本与收入模型，量化GPU-RAN部署的剩余算力，并评估将其租赁给AI租户的收益。结果表明，在涵盖Token贬值、需求动态变化及多种GPU服务密度的场景下，AI-on-RAN收入可抵消GPU密集部署的额外CAPEX与OPEX，投资回报率最高达8倍。该发现为基于加速器的RAN架构及未来6G部署提供了经济支撑。

overflow_list.title: Distributed User Scheduling in Multi-Cell MIMO O-RAN with QoS Constraints
overflow_list.authors: Tenghao Cai, Lei Li, Tsung-Hui Chang
overflow_list.affiliations: center | School Chinese | University Shenzhen(CUHK-Shenzhen),China | Shenzhen Research Institute | School CUHK-Shenzhen
overflow_list.abstract: Distributed scheduling is essential for open radio access network (O-RAN) employing advanced physical-layer techniques such as multi-user MIMO (MU-MIMO), carrier aggregation (CA), and joint transmission (JT). This work investigates the multi-component-carrier (multi-CC) resource block group (RBG) scheduling in MU-MIMO O-RAN with both JT and non-JT users. We formulate a scheduling optimization problem to maximize throughput subject to user-specific quality of service (QoS) requirements while ensuring consistent allocations across cooperating O-RAN radio units (O-RUs) required by JT transmission. The strong variable coupling, non-convexity, and combinatorial complexity make the problem highly challenging. To tackle this, we extend the eigen-based zero-forcing transceiver design to JT users and leverage massive MIMO asymptotic properties to derive a tractable, separable rate approximation. Building on this, we develop two solutions: a centralized block coordinate descent benchmark and a distributed scheduler aligned with the O-RAN architecture. The proposed distributed scheme achieves near-centralized performance with only one round of lightweight coordination among cells, significantly reducing complexity and delay. Extensive simulations validate that our distributed scheduler achieves high scalability, fast convergence, and better QoS satisfaction rate in large-scale MU-MIMO networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 分布式调度对于采用多用户MIMO（MU-MIMO）、载波聚合（CA）和联合传输（JT）等先进物理层技术的开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）至关重要。本文研究MU-MIMO O-RAN中多载波（multi-CC）资源块组（RBG）调度，同时考虑JT用户和非JT用户。我们将调度优化问题建模为在满足用户特定服务质量（QoS）要求的前提下最大化吞吐量，同时保证JT传输所需的O-RAN无线单元（O-RU）间的资源分配一致性。强变量耦合、非凸性和组合复杂性使该问题极具挑战性。为解决这一问题，我们将特征值型迫零收发设计扩展至JT用户，并利用大规模MIMO渐近特性推导出可分离的易处理速率近似。在此基础上，我们提出两种方案：集中式块坐标下降基准算法和符合O-RAN架构的分布式调度器。所提分布式方案仅需一轮轻量级小区间协调即可达到接近集中式的性能，显著降低了复杂度和时延。大量仿真验证表明，该分布式调度器在大规模MU-MIMO网络中具有高可扩展性、快速收敛性和更优的QoS满足率。

overflow_list.title: Weighted Sum-Rate Maximization for RIS-UAV-assisted Space-Air-Ground Integrated Network with RSMA
overflow_list.authors: Jian He, Cong Zhou, Shuo Shi
overflow_list.abstract: In this paper, a rate-splitting multiple access (RSMA) based joint optimization framework for the space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN) is proposed, where the satellite and base stations employ uniform planar array (UPA) antennas for signal transmission, and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) relay the satellite signals. Earth stations (ESs) and user equipments (UEs) receive signals from satellite and base stations (BSs), respectively, resulting in mutual interference. We first model the channels and signals in this scenario and analyse the interference at BSs and UEs. Then, We formulate a joint optimization problem aimed at maximizing the weighted sum-rate, involving beamforming, RIS-UAV deployment and phase shifts, and rate splitting. However, this problem is highly non-convex. To tackle this challenge, we apply a block coordinate descent (BCD) approach to decompose the problem and employ the weighted minimum mean square error (WMMSE) method to transform the non-convex objective function. For the rate-splitting sub-problem, a greedy algorithm is proposed and a successive convex approximation (SCA) algorithm is used for beamforming. Besides, the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) algorithm is employed for the RIS phase-shift problem with unit-modulus constraints, and an exhaustive search method is adopted for the complex UAV positioning and orientation. Simulation results validate that the proposed algorithm achieves superior performance in terms of user weighted sum-rate.
overflow_list.summary_cn: <think> 这是一篇关于卫星-空中-地面综合网络（SAGIN）中基于速率分割多址接入（RSMA）的联合优化框架的论文摘要。让我逐句翻译：  1. "In this paper, a rate-splitting multiple access (RSMA) based joint optimization framework for the space-air-ground integrated network (SAGIN) is proposed" - 本文提出了一种基于速率分割多址接入（RSMA）的空天地一体化网络（SAGIN）联合优化框架  2. "where the satellite and base stations employ uniform planar array (UPA) antennas for signal transmission, and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) relay the satellite signals" - 其中卫星和基站采用均匀面阵（UPA）天线进行信号传输，无人机（UAV）作为卫星信号中继  3. "Earth stations (ESs) and user equipments (UEs) receive signals from satellite and base stations (BSs), respectively, resulting in mutual interference" - 地球站（ES）和用户设备（UE）分别接收来自卫星和基站（BS）的信号，导致相互干扰  4. "We first model the channels and signals in this scenario and analyse the interference at BSs and UEs" - 首先对该场景中的信道和信号进行建模，并分析基站和用户端的干扰  5. "Then, We formulate a joint optimization problem aimed at maximizing the weighted sum-rate, involving beamforming, RIS-UAV deployment and phase shifts, and rate splitting" - 然后，制定了一个联合优化问题，目标是最大化加权和速率，涉及波束成形、可重构智能表面（RIS）-无人机部署和相位偏移，以及速率分割   - 优化问题高度非凸，需要采用块坐标下降（BCD）方法和加权最小均方误差（WMMSE）算法来处理复杂的约束条件和目标函数  我将使用块坐标下降方法分解问题，并通过加权最小均方误差方法转换非凸目标函数。针对速率分割子问题，采用贪婪算法和连续凸近似（SCA）技术进行波束成形优化。  对于RIS相位偏移问题，利用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）处理单位模约束，并通过穷举搜索方法确定无人机位置和方向。仿真结果验证了所提算法在用户加权和速率方面的优越性能。 </think>  本文提出了一种基于速率分割多址接入（RSMA）的空天地一体化网络（SAGIN）联合优化框架，其中卫星和基站采用均匀面阵（UPA）天线进行信号传输，无人机（UAV）作为卫星信号中继。地球站（ES）和用户设备（UE）分别接收来自卫星和基站（BS）的信号，导致相互干扰。本文首先对该场景中的信道和信号进行建模，并分析基站和用户端的干扰。然后，制定了一个联合优化问题，目标是最大化加权和速率，涉及波束成形、可重构智能表面（RIS）-无人机部署和相位偏移，以及速率分割。然而，该问题高度非凸。为解决这一挑战，采用块坐标下降（BCD）方法分解问题，并利用加权最小均方误差（WMMSE）方法转换非凸目标函数。对于速率分割子问题，提出贪婪算法，并采用连续凸近似（SCA）算法进行波束成形。此外，使用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）算法处理RIS相位偏移问题的单位模约束，并采用穷举搜索法确定复杂的无人机位置和方向。仿真结果验证了所提算法在用户加权和速率方面具有优越性能。

overflow_list.title: Integrated sensing and communications in the 3GPP New Radio: sensing limits
overflow_list.authors: Santiago Fernández, Javier Giménez, Mari Carmen Aguayo-Torres, José A. Cortés
overflow_list.abstract: Integrated Sensing and Communications (ISAC) is regarded as a key element of the beyond-fifth-generation (5G) and sixth-generation (6G) systems, raising the question of whether current 5G New Radio (NR) signal structures can meet the sensing accuracy requirements specified by the Third Generation Partnership Project (3GPP). This paper addresses this issue by analyzing the fundamental limits of range and velocity estimation through the Cramér-Rao lower bound (CRLB) for a monostatic unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) sensing use case currently under consideration in the 3GPP standardization process. The study focuses on standardized signals and also evaluates the potential performance gains achievable with reference signals specifically designed for sensing purposes.   The compact CRLB expressions derived in this work highlight the fundamental trade-offs between estimation accuracy and system parameters. The results further indicate that information from multiple slots must be exploited in the estimation process to attain the performance targets defined by the 3GPP. As a result, the 5G NR positioning reference signal (PRS), whose patterns may be suboptimal for velocity estimation when using single-slot resources, becomes suitable when multislot estimation is employed. Finally, we propose a two-step iterative range and radial-velocity estimator that attains the CRLB over a significantly wider range of distances than conventional maximum-likelihood (ML) estimators, for which the well-known threshold effect severely limits the distance range over which the accuracy requirements imposed by the 3GPP are satisfied.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 通感一体化（ISAC）被视为 beyond-5G 和 6G 系统的关键组成部分，由此引发一个问题：现有 5G NR 信号结构能否满足 3GPP 规定的感知精度要求。本文针对 3GPP 标准化进程中正在研究的单站无人机感知场景，通过 Cramér-Rao 下界（CRLB）分析距离与速度估计的基本极限来回答该问题。研究聚焦于标准化信号，同时评估专用于感知目的的参考信号可获得的潜在性能增益。  本文推导的紧凑 CRLB 表达式揭示了估计精度与系统参数之间的基本权衡。结果表明，估计过程中必须利用多个时隙的信息才能达到 3GPP 定义的性能指标。因此，5G NR 定位参考信号（PRS）在采用多时隙估计时具有适用性，尽管其图样在单时隙资源下对速度估计可能并非最优。最后，本文提出一种两步迭代距离与径向速度估计器，在显著更宽的距离范围内达到 CRLB，而传统最大似然（ML）估计器因众所周知的门限效应严重限制了满足 3GPP 精度要求的距离范围。

overflow_list.title: Performance Analysis of 5G RAN Slicing Deployment Options in Industry 4.0 Factories
overflow_list.authors: Oscar Adamuz-Hinojosa, Abdelhilah Abdeselam, Pablo Muñoz, Pablo Ameigeiras, Juan M. Lopez-Soler
overflow_list.abstract: This paper studies Radio Access Network (RAN) slicing strategies for 5G Industry~4.0 networks with ultra-reliable low-latency communication (uRLLC) requirements. We compare four RAN slicing deployment options that differ in slice sharing and in the degree of per-line or per-flow isolation. Unlike prior works that assume a fixed slicing structure, this work addresses how RAN slicing should be instantiated in the presence of multiple production lines and heterogeneous industrial flows. A Stochastic Network Calculus (SNC)-based analytical framework and a heuristic slice planner are used to evaluate per-flow delay guarantees and radio resource utilization. Within the considered RAN-level analytical model, the results show that, under resource scarcity, only per-flow slicing prevents delay violations, whereas slice-sharing and hybrid deployments improve aggregation efficiency at the cost of weaker protection for the most delay-critical flows. Execution-time results show that the proposed planner operates at non-real-time (Non-RT) time scales, supporting its implementation as an rApp within Open RAN (O-RAN) Non-RT RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) control loops.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 本文研究面向5G工业4.0网络、满足超高可靠低时延通信（uRLLC）需求的无线接入网（RAN）切片策略。我们比较了四种RAN切片部署方案，其在切片共享程度以及按产线或按流的隔离粒度上各有不同。与假设切片结构固定的已有研究不同，本文针对多产线与异构工业流共存的场景，探讨RAN切片的实例化方法。基于随机网络演算（SNC）的分析框架与启发式切片规划器，评估逐流时延保障与无线资源利用率。结果表明，在资源稀缺条件下，仅逐流切片能够避免时延越限，而切片共享与混合部署虽可提升聚合效率，但削弱了对最时延敏感流的保护。运行时间结果表明，所提规划器工作于非实时（Non-RT）时间尺度，可支持其作为rApp部署于O-RAN非实时RAN智能控制器（RIC）控制环路中。

overflow_list.title: A Survey on AI for 6G: Challenges and Opportunities
overflow_list.authors: Constantina Chatzieleftheriou, Eirini Liotou
overflow_list.abstract: As wireless communication evolves, each generation of networks brings new technologies that change how we connect and interact. Artificial Intelligence (AI) is becoming crucial in shaping the future of sixth-generation (6G) networks. By combining AI and Machine Learning (ML), 6G aims to offer high data rates, low latency, and extensive connectivity for applications including smart cities, autonomous systems, holographic telepresence, and the tactile internet. This paper provides a detailed overview of the role of AI in supporting 6G networks. It focuses on key technologies like deep learning, reinforcement learning, federated learning, and explainable AI. It also looks at how AI integrates with essential network functions and discusses challenges related to scalability, security, and energy efficiency, along with new solutions. Additionally, this work highlights perspectives that connect AI-driven analytics to 6G service domains like Ultra-Reliable Low-Latency Communication (URLLC), Enhanced Mobile Broadband (eMBB), Massive Machine-Type Communication (mMTC), and Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC). It addresses concerns about standardization, ethics, and sustainability. By summarizing recent research trends and identifying future directions, this survey offers a valuable reference for researchers and practitioners at the intersection of AI and next-generation wireless communication.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 随着无线通信的演进，每一代网络都带来了改变连接与交互方式的新技术。人工智能（AI）正成为塑造第六代（6G）网络未来的关键力量。通过融合AI与机器学习（ML），6G致力于为智能城市、自动驾驶系统、全息远程呈现及触觉互联网等应用提供高速率、低时延和海量连接能力。本文详细综述了AI在支撑6G网络中的角色，重点聚焦深度学习、强化学习、联邦学习和可解释性AI等关键技术，同时探讨了AI与核心网络功能的融合方式，并分析了可扩展性、安全性和能效等方面的挑战及新兴解决方案。此外，本文还阐述了AI驱动分析与6G服务领域的关联视角，涵盖超可靠低时延通信（URLLC）、增强型移动宽带（eMBB）、海量机器类通信（mMTC）及通信感知一体化（ISAC），并涉及标准化、伦理与可持续性等议题。本综述通过总结近期研究趋势并指明未来方向，为AI与下一代无线通信交叉领域的研究者和实践者提供了有价值的参考。

overflow_list.title: Energy Efficient Orchestration in Multiple-Access Vehicular Aerial-Terrestrial 6G Networks
overflow_list.authors: Mohammad Farhoudi, Hamidreza Mazandarani, Masoud Shokrnezhad, Tarik Taleb, Ignacio Lacalle
overflow_list.abstract: The proliferation of users, devices, and novel vehicular applications - propelled by advancements in autonomous systems and connected technologies - is precipitating an unprecedented surge in novel services. These emerging services require substantial bandwidth allocation, adherence to stringent Quality of Service (QoS) parameters, and energy-efficient implementations, particularly within highly dynamic vehicular environments. The complexity of these requirements necessitates a fundamental paradigm shift in service orchestration methodologies to facilitate seamless and robust service delivery. This paper addresses this challenge by presenting a novel framework for service orchestration in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV)-assisted 6G aerial-terrestrial networks. The proposed framework synergistically integrates UAV trajectory planning, Multiple-Access Control (MAC), and service placement to facilitate energy-efficient service coverage while maintaining ultra-low latency communication for vehicular user service requests. We first present a non-linear programming model that formulates the optimization problem. Next, to address the problem, we employ a Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning (HDRL) algorithm that dynamically predicts service requests, user mobility, and channel conditions, addressing the challenges of interference, resource scarcity, and mobility in heterogeneous networks. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in request acceptance, energy efficiency, and latency minimization, showcasing its potential to support the high demands of next-generation vehicular networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 随着自动驾驶系统和车联网技术的进步，用户、设备及新型车联网应用的激增催生了大量新服务。这些服务需要充足的带宽分配、严格的QoS保障和高效的能效实现，尤其在高度动态的车载环境中更为关键。这种复杂性要求服务编排方法发生根本性范式转变，以实现无缝且稳健的服务交付。  本文提出了一种UAV辅助的6G空天地网络服务编排框架。该框架协同集成UAV轨迹规划、多址接入控制（MAC）和服务放置，在保障车联网用户超低延迟通信的同时实现高效能服务覆盖。我们首先建立非线性规划模型对优化问题进行建模，随后采用分层深度强化学习（HDRL）算法，动态预测服务请求、用户移动性和信道状态，解决异构网络中的干扰、资源稀缺和移动性挑战。仿真结果表明，所提框架在请求接受率、能效和延迟优化方面均优于现有方案，展现了支撑下一代车联网高需求应用的潜力。

overflow_list.title: Fronthaul Network Planning for Hierarchical and Radio-Stripes-Enabled CF-mMIMO in O-RAN
overflow_list.authors: Anas S. Mohammed, Krishnendu S. Tharakan, Hussein A. Ammar, Hesham ElSawy, Hossam S. Hassanein
overflow_list.affiliations: Ericsson’ s | Institute | Department | College | School | University
overflow_list.abstract: The deployment of ultra-dense networks (UDNs), particularly cell-free massive MIMO (CF-mMIMO), is mainly hindered by costly and capacity-limited fronthaul links. This work proposes a two-tiered optimization framework for cost-effective hybrid fronthaul planning, comprising a Near-Optimal Fronthaul Association and Configuration (NOFAC) algorithm in the first tier and an Integer Linear Program (ILP) in the second, integrating fiber optics, millimeter-wave (mmWave), and free-space optics (FSO) technologies. The proposed framework accommodates various functional split (FS) options (7.2x and 8), decentralized processing levels, and network configurations. We introduce the hierarchical scheme (HS) as a resilient, cost-effective fronthaul solution for CF-mMIMO and compare its performance with radio-stripes (RS)-enabled CF-mMIMO, validating both across diverse dense topologies within the open radio access network (O-RAN) architecture. Results show that the proposed framework achieves better cost-efficiency and higher capacity compared to traditional benchmark schemes such as all-fiber fronthaul network. Our key findings reveal fiber dominance in highly decentralized deployments, mmWave suitability in moderately centralized scenarios, and FSO complements both by bridging deployment gaps. Additionally, FS7.2x consistently outperforms FS8, offering greater capacity at lower cost, affirming its role as the preferred O-RAN functional split. Most importantly, our study underscores the importance of hybrid fronthaul effective planning for UDNs in minimizing infrastructural redundancy, and ensuring scalability to meet current and future traffic demands.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 超密集网络（UDN）的部署，特别是无蜂窝大规模MIMO（CF-mMIMO），主要受限于成本高昂且容量有限的前传链路。本文提出了一种双层优化框架，用于低成本混合前传规划，包含第一层的次优前传关联与配置（NOFAC）算法和第二层的整数线性规划（ILP），整合了光纤、毫米波（mmWave）和自由空间光学（FSO）技术。该框架支持多种功能分割方案（FS7.2x和FS8）、去中心化处理层级和网络配置。我们引入分层方案（HS）作为CF-MIMO的弹性低成本前传解决方案，并将其与射频条带（RS）启用的CF-MIMO进行性能比较，在开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）架构内的多种密集拓扑中进行验证。结果表明，与传统基准方案（如全光纤前传网络）相比，该框架实现了更好的成本效率和更高的容量。我们的关键发现揭示了光纤在高度去中心化部署中的主导地位、毫米波在适度集中化场景中的适用性，以及FSO通过弥合部署空白来补充两者。此外，FS7.2x始终优于FS8，以更低成本提供更大容量，确认其作为首选O-RAN功能分割的地位。最重要的是，我们的研究强调了UDN混合前传有效规划对于最小化基础设施冗余、确保可扩展性以满足当前和未来流量需求的重要性。

overflow_list.title: ML-Enabled Open RAN: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Challenges, and Opportunities
overflow_list.authors: Mira Chandra Kirana, Patatchona Keyela, Fatemeh Rostamian, Deemah H. Tashman, Soumaya Cherkaoui
overflow_list.abstract: As wireless communication systems become more advanced, Open Radio Access Networks (O-RAN) stand out as a notable framework that promotes interoperability and cost-effectiveness. An examination of the progression of RAN architectures, as well as O-RAN's underlying principles, reveals the importance of machine learning (ML) in addressing various challenges, including spectrum management, resource allocation, and security. Hence, this survey provides a comprehensive overview of the integration of ML within O-RAN, highlighting its transformative potential in enhancing network performance and efficiency. This survey aims to describe the current status of ML applications in O-RAN while indicating possible directions for future research by analyzing existing literature. The findings aim to assist researchers and stakeholders in formulating optimal service strategies and advancing the understanding of intelligent wireless networks.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 随着无线通信系统的不断演进，开放式无线接入网（O-RAN）作为促进互操作性与成本效益的重要框架备受关注。通过对RAN架构演进及O-RAN核心原则的考察，揭示了机器学习（ML）在应对频谱管理、资源分配和安全等挑战中的关键作用。因此，本综述全面概述了ML与O-RAN的融合应用，阐明了其在提升网络性能与效率方面的变革性潜力。本综述旨在通过分析现有文献，描述ML在O-RAN中的应用现状，并指出未来研究的可能方向。研究结论旨在为研究人员和相关利益方制定最优服务策略提供参考，推动对智能无线网络的深入理解。

overflow_list.title: CSI-tuples-based 3D Channel Fingerprints Construction Assisted by MultiModal Learning
overflow_list.authors: Chenjie Xie, Li You, Ruirong Chen, Gaoning He, Xiqi Gao
overflow_list.affiliations: nications Research Laboratory,Southeast University,Nanjing210096,China | Nanjing China | Huawei | Shenzhen Chinaruirongchen@huawei.com | ing@huawei.com)
overflow_list.abstract: Low-altitude communications can promote the integration of aerial and terrestrial wireless resources, expand network coverage, and enhance transmission quality, thereby empowering the development of sixth-generation (6G) mobile communications. As an enabler for low-altitude transmission, 3D channel fingerprints (3D-CF), also referred to as the 3D radio map or 3D channel knowledge map, are expected to enhance the understanding of communication environments and assist in the acquisition of channel state information (CSI), thereby avoiding repeated estimations and reducing computational complexity. In this paper, we propose a modularized multimodal framework to construct 3D-CF. Specifically, we first establish the 3D-CF model as a collection of CSI-tuples based on Rician fading channels, with each tuple comprising the low-altitude vehicle's (LAV) positions and its corresponding statistical CSI. In consideration of the heterogeneous structures of different prior data, we formulate the 3D-CF construction problem as a multimodal regression task, where the target channel information in the CSI-tuple can be estimated directly by its corresponding LAV positions, together with communication measurements and geographic environment maps. Then, a high-efficiency multimodal framework is proposed accordingly, which includes a correlation-based multimodal fusion (Corr-MMF) module, a multimodal representation (MMR) module, and a CSI regression (CSI-R) module. Numerical results show that our proposed framework can efficiently construct 3D-CF and achieve at least 27.5% higher accuracy than the state-of-the-art algorithms under different communication scenarios, demonstrating its competitive performance and excellent generalization ability. We also analyze the computational complexity and illustrate its superiority in terms of the inference time.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 低空通信可促进空地无线资源融合、扩展网络覆盖、提升传输质量，从而赋能第六代（6G）移动通信发展。作为低空传输的关键使能技术，三维信道指纹（3D-CF），又称三维无线电地图或三维信道知识地图，有望增强对通信环境的理解，辅助获取信道状态信息（CSI），从而避免重复估计并降低计算复杂度。本文提出一种模块化多模态框架来构建3D-CF。具体而言，首先基于Rician衰落信道建立3D-CF模型，将其表示为CSI元组的集合，每个元组包含低空飞行器（LAV）位置及其对应的统计信道信息。考虑到不同先验数据的异构结构特性，我们将3D-CF构建问题建模为多模态回归任务，可通过对应的LAV位置、通信测量及地理环境地图直接估计目标信道信息。随后，提出一种高效多模态框架，包含基于关联性的多模态融合（Corr-MMF）模块、多模态表征（MMR）模块和CSI回归（CSI-R）模块。数值结果表明，所提框架能高效构建3D-CF，在不同通信场景下精度比现有最优算法提升至少27.5%，展现出较强的竞争性能和优异的泛化能力。此外，我们还分析了计算复杂度，验证了其在推理时间上的优势。

overflow_list.title: A Wireless World Model for AI-Native 6G Networks
overflow_list.authors: Ziqi Chen, Yi Ren, Yixuan Huang, Qi Sun, Nan Li, Yuhong Huang, Chih-Lin I, Yifan Li, Liang Xia
overflow_list.abstract: Integrating AI into the physical layer is a cornerstone of 6G networks. However, current data-driven approaches struggle to generalize across dynamic environments because they lack an intrinsic understanding of electromagnetic wave propagation. We introduce the Wireless World Model (WWM), a multi-modal foundation framework predicting the spatiotemporal evolution of wireless channels by internalizing the causal relationship between 3D geometry and signal dynamics. Pre-trained on a massive ray-traced multi-modal dataset, WWM overcomes the data authenticity gap, further validated under real-world measurement data. Using a joint-embedding predictive architecture with a multi-modal mixture-of-experts Transformer, WWM fuses channel state information, 3D point clouds, and user trajectories into a unified representation. Across the five key downstream tasks supported by WWM, it achieves remarkable performance in seen environments, unseen generalization scenarios, and real-world measurements, consistently outperforming SOTA uni-modal foundation models and task-specific models. This paves the way for physics-aware 6G intelligence that adapts to the physical world.
overflow_list.summary_cn: 将AI融入物理层是6G网络的核心。然而，当前数据驱动方法因缺乏对电磁波传播的内在理解，难以在动态环境中泛化。我们提出无线世界模型（WWM），一种多模态基础框架，通过内化3D几何与信号动态之间的因果关系来预测无线信道的时空演化。WWM在大规模光线追踪多模态数据集上预训练，克服了数据真实性差距，并在真实测量数据上得到进一步验证。WWM采用联合嵌入预测架构与多模态混合专家Transformer，将信道状态信息、3D点云和用户轨迹融合为统一表示。在WWM支持的五个下游任务中，其在可见环境、不可见泛化场景和真实测量中均表现出色，持续优于最先进的单模态基础模型和任务专用模型。这为适应物理世界的可感知物理的6G智能铺平了道路。
